calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Traditional Mandate [Ccp 1085]
Off Calendar Dec-18-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
LONG X. DO Esq., ATHENE LAW, LLP (415) 680-7419 long@athenelaw.com Attorneys for Petitioner California Medical Association
MOE KESHAVARZI, Esq., SHEPPARD, MULLIN, RICHTER & HAMPTON LLP 213.620.1780 mkeshavarzi@sheppardmullin.com Attorney for Intervenor, California Association of Health Plans
DARIN L.WESSEL, Esq., Deputy Attorney General (619) 738-9125 Darin.Wessel@doj.ca.gov
Attorney for Respondents Mary Watanabe, in her official capacity as Director of the California Department of Managed Health Care; and California Department of Managed Health Care
Ryan Wheeler, CSR 13717, 760-805-3971 ryanwheeler91@yahoo.com Court reporter,(via ZOOM)

Counsel for Petitioner California Medical Association contests the Court's tentative ruling.

Hearing is held. Argued. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER CALIFORNIA MEDICAL ASSOCIATION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Traditional Mandate [Ccp 1085] is taken under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter:Ryan Wheeler, CSR 13717, 760-805-3971 ryanwheeler91@yahoo.com Court reporter, Reported. (302/RBU)
